title: Option for a portfolio to pull in other portfolios without having to mirror each item

posts.author: KateH1 (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We have multiple portfolios per domain with many projects in each and a constant flow of new items added.
We would like the option to have a higher up portfolio that automatically pulls in multiple other portfolios for a overarching view of all the smaller ones.
We have tried the mirroring a portfolio in a dashboard but the window does not expand enough so it crops off from a certain point. I know you can expand the window but it is a bit clunky.

What are you trying to achieve

A higher up level portfolio that can pull in normal portfolios

posts.author: DavidDvorak (David)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agree, it is difficult to provide an aggregated view of portfolios, they are very much siloed. I have a related feature request for portfolios nested under portfolios that’s worth upvoting/checking out:

Portfolios under portfolios Feature requests
Description I would like to nest a portfolio under another portfolio. Often we have groups of related projects that we would like to track as a “program”. We want to provide a high level report on program progress, yet we also want to track and report on the projects within that program. Ideally, a portfolio would be the Monday.com item I use to represent a program. However, I’m already using the portfolio object to group projects by team in my IT organization (one portfolio for our infrastr…
